TargetSelectionBeforeFirstAnim.Description: Target selected before the first animation begins

TargetSelectionBeforeResponseWindow.Description: Selected a target before the response window after an animation

TargetSelectionWithinResponseWindow.Description: Successfully selected a target object within the response window

TargetSelectionAfterResponseWindow.Description: Selected a target after the response window after an animation

AdditionalTargetSelection.Description: Selected a target again during the current interval

TargetAnimWithoutSelection.Description: Target animation occured without a selection
